name: MultiWAVE MIDI Inlet
description: Passive 2HP USB-MIDI expansion for MultiWAVE. Adds MIDI and MPE access, firmware management and wavetable upload support without consuming power.

inputs.name: USB-C Host
inputs.description: USB MIDI host connection for MultiWAVE. Enables MIDI, MPE and file management from a computer or other USB host.

outputs.name: USB-C Device
outputs.description: Passes the USB connection through to MultiWAVE.

behaviors.name: Adds USB MIDI
behaviors.description: The inlet adds USB MIDI access to MultiWAVE so the oscillator can be played from a DAW or USB controller.

behaviors.name: Supports MPE
behaviors.description: The inlet exposes MultiWAVE to MPE when the parent module is updated to a compatible firmware revision.

behaviors.name: Required outside N.U.S.S.
behaviors.trigger: MultiWAVE used outside the New Universal Synthesizer System skiff
behaviors.description: The manual frames the inlet as the required physical and electronic support for USB control when MultiWAVE is not installed in the dedicated skiff.

behaviors.name: Firmware and wavetable access
behaviors.description: The inlet gives easy access to firmware updates and custom wavetable uploading from the USB host connection.

patchIdeas.name: DAW-driven MultiWAVE voice
patchIdeas.patch: USB host to inlet · MultiWAVE on MIDI channel 1 · keyboard or DAW notes activate the 8-voice core · use Span modes for round-robin or parallel behavior.
patchIdeas.diagram:
MultiWAVE MIDI Inlet:

MultiWAVE:
Keyboard:
Output:

- Keyboard (USB MIDI) >> MultiWAVE MIDI Inlet (USB-C Host)
- MultiWAVE MIDI Inlet (USB-C Device) -> MultiWAVE (USB-C)
- MultiWAVE (Out 1-8) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: MPE ribbon lead
patchIdeas.patch: MPE host to inlet · MultiWAVE firmware 4.1.6+ · per-note expression from the controller shapes channel activation and pitch behavior without front-panel repatching.
patchIdeas.diagram:
MultiWAVE MIDI Inlet:

MultiWAVE:
MPE Controller:
Output:

- MPE Controller (USB MIDI) >> MultiWAVE MIDI Inlet (USB-C Host)
- MultiWAVE MIDI Inlet (USB-C Device) -> MultiWAVE (USB-C)
- MultiWAVE (Out 1-8) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Wavetable maintenance link
patchIdeas.patch: USB host to inlet · use the same connection for firmware updates and custom wavetable upload workflows · no power draw and no front-panel cable clutter.
patchIdeas.diagram:
MultiWAVE MIDI Inlet:

Computer:
MultiWAVE:

- Computer (USB MIDI) >> MultiWAVE MIDI Inlet (USB-C Host)
- MultiWAVE MIDI Inlet (USB-C Device) -> MultiWAVE (USB-C)
